# Yoked

> Yoked is an AI-powered fitness app that creates personalized workout programs using artificial intelligence. Available on iOS.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://yoked.fitness/): AI fitness app landing page — features, how it works, FAQ
- [Blog](https://yoked.fitness/blog/): AI fitness insights, workout science, and training tips
- [Privacy Policy](https://yoked.fitness/privacy/): Privacy policy for the Yoked app

## Blog Articles

- [How AI Fitness Apps Actually Work](https://yoked.fitness/blog/how-ai-fitness-apps-work/): Technical breakdown of how AI creates personalized workout programs — exercise selection, volume programming, progressive overload, and continuous adaptation.
- [AI Fitness Coach vs Personal Trainer](https://yoked.fitness/blog/ai-fitness-coach-vs-personal-trainer/): Data-driven comparison of AI fitness coaching versus human personal trainers — cost, effectiveness, availability, form correction, and when each makes sense.
- [Best AI Fitness Apps in 2026](https://yoked.fitness/blog/best-ai-fitness-apps-2026/): Honest comparison of top AI fitness apps including Yoked, Fitbod, Freeletics, and GymStreak — features, pricing, and ideal use cases.
- [Beginner's Guide to AI-Powered Workouts](https://yoked.fitness/blog/beginners-guide-ai-workouts/): Getting started with AI workout apps — what to expect, first week tips, and common beginner questions answered.
- [How Yoked Personalizes Every Workout](https://yoked.fitness/blog/how-yoked-personalizes-workouts/): Deep dive into Yoked's personalization — from training experience and goals to equipment availability and schedule constraints.

## Key Facts

- App Name: Yoked
- Category: AI Fitness / Health Application
- Platforms: iOS (Android coming soon)
- Price: Free to download. AI program generation: $4.99/month or $34.99/year.
- Key Feature: AI-generated personalized workout programs
- Website: https://yoked.fitness
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/yoked-ai-trainer/id6758185782
